channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 19 com severidade Alta
• 8 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 How to Upgrade to VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
The process of upgrading to VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1 depends on the version of VCF that you’re currently running as well as a mix of environmental, software and hardware considerations. For example, a specific hardware requirement may have changed and is no longer supported in a later version of VCF.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/18/how-to-upgrade-to-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1/
 
📰 VCF Breakroom Chats Episode 88 – Unpacking the Latest AI Advancements in the VCF 9.1 Release- 1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/18/unpacking-the-latest-ai-advancements-in-the-vcf-9-1-release-1/
 
📰 F5 Patches Critical, High-Severity NGINX Vulnerabilities - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Nginx, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 F5 Patches Critical NGINX Vulnerabilities Enabling Unauthenticated Code Execution - Security Affairs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Nginx, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiygFBVV95cUxQQjhVdFh6OWRfWm01MTN0YUMwQkl6VE0zSkhHaTFGNVF2LUlTYkRiMlFsZGptekNsVVVyemtWaUlDbUhUTEo0TGYzbm9mel9ZSjY4ckdfSTZBS19VVnFrTHRuZGlwOTRjWElIZXhZN2doQllXelNQelZjTUtYMjlvcnduQnMtR1g3d2xoay1YNnNKOF9JMXpQU0EtWXpHZ0tWRXZsUzljQ2pvY2hVWUEwaGxHMzl0bXlNR1F5cjYzYV92TW9XTnE1ZHZn?oc=5
 
📰 F5 issues out-of-band patches for critical NGINX vulnerabilities - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Nginx, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Elevating Enterprise Kubernetes with Automated Security, Scale, and Seamless Add-ons: Introducing VKS 3.7
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 3.7
Resumo:
Managing modern applications at scale requires a delicate balancing act. To deploy these workloads successfully, platform teams must constantly juggle competing priorities: accelerating developer velocity, hardening security, and adopting leading edge ecosystem tools—all while operating within strict compliance guardrails. The release of VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service (VKS) 3.7 will directly address these prioriti...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/16/elevating-enterprise-kubernetes-with-automated-security-scale-and-seamless-add-ons-introducing-vks-3-7/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Microsoft Confirms RoguePlanet Defender Zero-Day, Says Patch is in Development
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Microsoft has formally disclosed that it's working to release a patch to address a Defender zero-day codenamed RoguePlanet. The vulnerability has now been assigned the CVE identifier CVE-2026-50656 (CVSS score: 7.8), with the tech giant describing it as a privilege escalation flaw. "Microsoft is aware of an elevation of privilege in the Microsoft Malware Protection Engine in Microsoft Defender
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/microsoft-confirms-rogueplanet-defender_02022423645.html
 
💣 ShinyHunters Exploits Oracle PeopleSoft Zero-Day in 100-Org Wave: Check Point June 15 Threat Intelligence - Cybersecurity Insiders
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Check Point. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxORWQ2VHExVmNZU0I5TW9SRmc2TnFELWtHTno4cm9qS0dkdkdWVVFtX0MxYkFfV0RjN0JqTDFCU0x5LV9OU0hiWGFXTXFoQW45c0xNb2lnZGxlNmRSV1lNRjVkbTREbjZCQUJvcE5aMzhTVktyc2RoYXhKcFRSdklWYUIyclVUazRkYTNfNldLZGxqVVgtUEk2YXhtekJUX3JzcV9PSG4wM3RnUQ?oc=5
 
📰 Apple fixes Beats Studio Buds flaw that let hackers spy on conversations
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Apple has released security updates to patch a high-severity flaw affecting the Beats Studio Buds wireless earbuds that could allow attackers in Bluetooth range to spy on users' conversations.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/apple-fixes-beats-studio-buds-flaw-that-let-hackers-spy-on-conversations/
 
📰 F5 issues out-of-band patches for critical NGINX vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity company F5 has released out-of-band security updates to address multiple NGINX web server vulnerabilities, including two critical-severity flaws that could allow attackers to execute code on vulnerable systems.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/f5-issues-out-of-band-patches-for-critical-nginx-vulnerabilities/
 
📰 Police cleans nearly 15,000 SocGholish-infected sites tied to Evil Corp
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
International law enforcement agencies cleaned nearly 15,000 malware-infected WordPress websites and took down more than 100 servers linked to the SocGholish botnet and the Evil Corp Russian cybercrime group.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/law-enforcement-nukes-socgholish-malware-from-nearly-15-000-sites/
 
📰 Acronis Research Highlights Rapid Evolution of INC Ransomware into One of the World's Most Active Cyber Threats - CXO Digitalpulse
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Acronis
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Acronis, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 [South Africa] Check Point, Illumio deepen ties to fight AI-driven cyberattacks - Africa Business Communities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxPVDJlYXc4OE1CZkZlQTdpS2ZNYWVjSC1zM0dwanFGQ1hFSjVnYUNwUWxSRVV3YzdxMVU4c0Mxa3Fmc3BRajg2TW9fY1EydnIxNktoajJMQkUwclRSblFZTXNOVnZOQ3R2c05EZUI4YzNhMUVlTzRPSmlUV3lfLU1XMTBuU2U2NE5XY1hCcXJKVW5TWWktRlNIOUxWWVZjT21KcFN2Z1R6MmNvaFRpZWV4Tkt2b3B3eGhiMFp3Vlo3eVM?oc=5
 
📰 Crypto Clipper Campaign Abuses Fake Reviews, AI Narrators, and VirusTotal Comments
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
An unknown threat actor has been observed leveraging paid or promoted posts on legitimate news websites to drum up buzz for their warez, according to new findings from Check Point Research. The threat actor also has at their disposal a dedicated WordPress phishing page that acts as the central hub, alongside GitHub and SourceForge projects promoted by fake accounts, a YouTube channel, and a
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/crypto-clipper-campaign-abuses-fake.html
 
📰 Check Point and Illumio Expand Partnership to Deliver Protection and Resilience Against Frontier AI-Powered Attacks - Illumio
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMie0FVX3lxTE5wdDdsMjlkN28zaGNIdEZJNlc0eXVsX05Tc3pKU3lENF9PVGg4UDRfM2xLT284LUdwQ3UxaXNUOFZtNmdIVHY0TjhJQmkwYjZJcWJkU2FrU0pQZDc5X2pmal9CUUctdEl6WWJtRUhtX0VoeGJNbGF0VG5BSQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8442-1: kitty vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that kitty incorrectly handled certain image data. An attacker able to write to the terminal's input could possibly use this issue to cause kitty to crash, resulting in a denial of service, or possibly execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-33633) It was discovered that kitty incorrectly handled certain graphics commands. An attacker able to write escape sequences to a kitty terminal could possibly use t...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8442-1
 
🚨 USN-8438-1: OpenImageIO vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that OpenImageIO incorrectly performed bounds checking when processing SGI files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service or execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-43903) It was discovered that OpenImageIO incorrectly handled run-length encoding when processing Softimage PIC files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service or execute arbitrary c...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8438-1
 
💣 Hackers Exploit WordPress SMTP Plugin With 100,000+ Installs to Steal Sensitive Data - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMickFVX3lxTFBrN0dBX29OcW1SMVFINy05T2lDUkQ3bzVmQjNlSFZrbE42NUItZzdwSnlCd0x1WXNybUx5NlJmbXlFTVJuaGZvSklCQU9oUWxxTDVtbFUwZUdHd2xGNU5HY3RrZm9ic1RqdmpYTUNtcy0zQQ?oc=5
 
📰 DragonForce Ransomware Abused Microsoft Teams to Hide Malware Activity - Hackread
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMid0FVX3lxTE1oNU5UOHAwUVBwLUJXV1lPYzU3bzJXSTVJWEtmbTBPWGdvRmRjOXlSVUpULVp2YnJrLXlQMlNqNGR6MXZyeTNJbVpmT2tJQ1ZGTXJRMjRMX1I5eWszYlNaM3J4QmlScUZGNVh4Y1d4dHVDaC1zVnNN?oc=5
 
📰 Hidden in Teams: DragonForce Attackers Weaponize Microsoft Teams Relays to Stay Hidden - SECURITY.COM
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTFB5aTcxeWJGaVVtZVo5aF9vVFZlQTRQSlZvVFR0VUhQeWVxT2V2dnpiZF9HX2g3a0hhUnEzOHJ1TzY0d1BEZ3BUd0pkYlVwSHNJaEhLcGswNHJ6dlk5VllWQVBTQ1lNTmNNYnkwVWptMy1nUUtHeUFIbTJuckUxZw?oc=5
 
📰 USN-8449-1: ldns vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Pablo Ruiz discovered that ldns did not properly validate DNS responses when used as a stub resolver over UDP. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to inject arbitrary DNS responses.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8449-1
 
📰 Microsoft Working on Patch for ‘RoguePlanet’ Zero-Day - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Patchstack & GoDaddy add WordPress vulnerability detection - SecurityBrief New Zealand
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a WordPress, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilAFBVV95cUxOZEFFMURTTVlnd0dnT2Y3b2NCdlBvSHkwazRoWGlsejhlcko4WGdjd1YxOXkwZUZNajlETkVGVzFlZ3UyY0NFbzh2YlJOaDNFcWF1dlZIVG9WQUxqeDh4NVR2RVQzVnl1ZlloSElra0ZKeThWbWhGd3Q0eUpBQi1hRlgzd0QzSXRoS0ZBWjlJaThlZ21W?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 16/06/2026 até 18/06/2026.
